title: Tizen Community Package manifest
description: One file per app under packages/. Compiled into repos-build.json / repos-sync.json by scripts/build-manifests.sh.

name.description: Display name shown in the README table. No '|' or newlines.

description.description: One-line description for the README table. No '|' or newlines.

repo.description: GitHub owner/repo. Used as the manifest key, the README link, and (for build/release) the API target.

repo_label.description: Optional link text for the README Repository column. Defaults to the repo owner.

source.description: build = compiled from source with Tizen Studio; release = prebuilt .wgt from GitHub Releases; direct = downloaded from a fixed URL.

project_path.description: build only. Subdirectory containing the Tizen web project. Defaults to ".".

pre_build.description: build only. Shell command run before packaging.

url.description: direct only. Absolute URL to the .wgt.

output_name.description: Filename inside the bundle. Required unless using assets[].

assets.description: release only. Use when one release contains multiple .wgt files.

match.description: Exact asset name or a regex matched against release asset names.
